name: return_request
input_text: I need to return a USB-C Hub from order ORD-9873. What's the process?
output_text: Happy to help with your return! Order ORD-9873 was delivered on February 20th. To return your USB-C Hub, log into your account, go to 'Order History', click 'Return Item', and follow the prompts. Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days to your original payment method. Our 30-day return window still applies since delivery was recent. Is there anything else I can help you with?
